summary: ReAssure 2.0 is a comprehensive health insurance policy covering Allopathic and AYUSH treatments taken in India only. The policy offers multiple sum insured options with benefits like unlimited coverage through ReAssure+ or ReAssureX, Booster+ accumulation, modern treatments, pre and post hospitalization expenses, and various optional benefits.
coverage: Road Ambulance expenses up to Sum Insured
Air Ambulance up to INR 2,50,000 per hospitalization in emergency cases
Hospitalization expenses for treatment (minimum 2 hours admission, 24 hours for AYUSH)
Modern treatments including Robotic surgeries, Immunotherapy, Stem cell therapy
Pre-hospitalization expenses for 60 days before admission
Post-hospitalization expenses for 180 days after discharge
Annual Health Checkup once per policy year
waiting_periods: Pre-existing Disease: 36 months of continuous coverage
Specified disease/procedure: 24 months (not applicable for accidents or cancer after 30 days)
30-day waiting period for any illness except accidents
Personal Waiting Period: up to 48 months for specified conditions
room_rent: No specific room rent limit mentioned - choose room judiciously to protect Sum Insured
ICU admission always paid up to Base Sum Insured regardless of room type chosen
Room Type Modification available - can choose between Single Private Room and Sharing Room
co_pay: Co-payment is percentage of admissible claim amount that insured must bear
Co-payment does not apply to Annual Health Check-up, Live Healthy, Second Medical Opinion, Shared Accommodation Cash, e-consultation, Personal Accident, Hospital Daily Cash benefits
Co-payment does not reduce the Sum Insured
deductible: Annual Aggregate Deductible available as option
Deductible amount must be payable as per policy terms and conditions
Deductible does not apply to Annual Health Check-up, Live Healthy, Second Medical Opinion, Shared Accommodation Cash, e-consultation, Personal Accident, Hospital Daily Cash benefits
Deductible does not reduce the Sum Insured
claims_information: Cashless facility available at network providers
Claims paid for hospitalization of minimum 2 hours (24 hours for AYUSH treatment)
Notification of claim through recognized modes of communication
Claims not paid for admissions primarily for diagnostics and evaluation only
exclusions: Rest cure, rehabilitation and respite care
Cosmetic or plastic surgery (unless medically necessary)
Breach of law with criminal intent
Dental treatment (except due to accidents and cancers)

faqs.question: What does ReAssure 2.0 cover?
faqs.answer: ReAssure 2.0 covers Allopathic and AYUSH treatments taken in India only, including hospitalization, pre and post hospitalization expenses, modern treatments, and various optional benefits.

faqs.question: What is the minimum hospitalization period required for claims?
faqs.answer: Minimum 2 hours of hospitalization is required for regular treatment, and minimum 24 hours for AYUSH treatment in an AYUSH Hospital.

faqs.question: What is ReAssure+ Forever benefit?
faqs.answer: ReAssure+ Forever provides unlimited Sum Insured once triggered by the first paid claim in the policy's life. Maximum amount paid per single claim is up to Base Sum Insured.

faqs.question: How does the Booster+ benefit work?
faqs.answer: Booster+ carries forward unutilized Base Sum Insured and accumulates up to 3/5/10 times the Base Sum Insured based on the plan chosen.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for pre-existing diseases?
faqs.answer: Pre-existing diseases have a waiting period of 36 months of continuous coverage from the date of inception of the first policy.

faqs.question: Are accidents covered from day one?
faqs.answer: Yes, accidents are covered from day one and are exempt from most waiting periods including pre-existing disease and specified disease waiting periods.

faqs.question: What modern treatments are covered?
faqs.answer: Covered modern treatments include Robotic surgeries, Immunotherapy, Stem cell therapy, Stereotactic radio surgeries, Deep Brain stimulation, and others as specified in the policy.

faqs.question: How long are pre and post hospitalization expenses covered?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization expenses are covered for 60 days before admission and post-hospitalization expenses for 180 days after discharge, if related to the hospitalization condition.

faqs.question: What is the Annual Health Checkup benefit?
faqs.answer: Annual Health Checkup is available once every policy year from day 1, must be booked through digital assets, available only on cashless basis with specified list of tests.

faqs.question: What is the Lock the Clock feature?
faqs.answer: Lock the Clock locks your age at policy entry for premium calculation until a claim is paid. After a claim, premium is charged as per current age.

faqs.question: Are AYUSH treatments covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatments (Ayurveda, Yoga, Naturopathy, Unani, Sidha, Homeopathy) are covered when taken at qualified AYUSH hospitals with minimum 24-hour admission.

faqs.question: What is the Live Healthy benefit?
faqs.answer: Live Healthy offers up to 30% renewal discount by walking and earning health points through the recommended mobile app. 1000 steps earn one health point.

faqs.question: Are organ donor expenses covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, hospitalization expenses of organ donors for harvesting are covered when the recipient's hospitalization claim is paid, and expenses for organ donation by insured are also covered.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Safeguard and Safeguard+?
faqs.answer: Safeguard covers non-payable items from List I and protects Booster+ up to INR 50,000. Safeguard+ covers Lists I-IV and protects Booster+ up to INR 1,00,000.

faqs.question: Is there a free look period?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is a 30-day free look period from receipt of policy document to review terms and return the policy if not satisfied.

faqs.question: Can the policy be cancelled?
faqs.answer: Yes, policyholder can cancel anytime with 7 days written notice. Proportionate premium refund available if no claims made during the policy period.

faqs.question: What is Day Care Treatment?
faqs.answer: Day Care Treatment is medical treatment or surgical procedure under anesthesia in less than 24 hours due to technological advancement, which would otherwise require longer hospitalization.

faqs.question: Are cosmetic surgeries covered?
faqs.answer: Cosmetic surgeries are excluded unless for reconstruction following accident, burns, cancer, or as medically necessary treatment certified by attending medical practitioner.

faqs.question: What is the grace period for premium payment?
faqs.answer: Grace period is 15 days for monthly premium payment mode and 30 days for all other payment modes.

faqs.question: Are dental treatments covered?
faqs.answer: Dental treatments are excluded except when due to accidents and cancers.

faqs.question: What is Domiciliary Hospitalization?
faqs.answer: Domiciliary Hospitalization is medical treatment at home which would normally require hospital care, when patient cannot be moved to hospital or due to room unavailability.

faqs.question: Is there coverage for air ambulance?
faqs.answer: Yes, air ambulance is covered only in emergency cases up to maximum INR 2,50,000 per hospitalization, paid only if hospitalization claim is paid.

faqs.question: What is the Personal Accident benefit?
faqs.answer: Personal Accident benefit covers Accidental Death, Permanent Total Disability, and Permanent Partial Disability within 365 days of accident during policy period.

faqs.question: Are maternity expenses covered?
faqs.answer: Maternity expenses are excluded, including childbirth, complicated deliveries, caesarean sections, except ectopic pregnancy.

faqs.question: What happens if I don't use my Annual Health Checkup?
faqs.answer: Unutilized amount from Annual Health Checkup will not be carried forward to the next policy year.

faqs.question: Can I get a second medical opinion?
faqs.answer: Yes, once per policy year you can get a second medical opinion from any medical practitioner for conditions where hospitalization claim was paid.

faqs.question: What is the Hospital Cash benefit?
faqs.answer: Hospital Cash is an optional benefit paying fixed amount for each day of hospitalization for maximum 30 days, available if hospitalized for 48 hours or more continuously.

faqs.question: Are adventure sports injuries covered?
faqs.answer: No, expenses from participation as professional in hazardous or adventure sports like para-jumping, rock climbing, motor racing are excluded.

faqs.question: What is the Shared Accommodation Cash Benefit?
faqs.answer: If you opt for a shared room for which hospitalization claim is paid, an additional amount is paid for each day of hospitalization (24 continuous hours).

faqs.question: Can I enhance my Sum Insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can enhance Sum Insured. When enhanced, accumulated Booster+ continues and grows more, but certain waiting periods may apply afresh to the increased amount.
